suggestions.title: Avoid permanent sys.modules side effects in import-contract test
suggestions.summary: The test mutates sys.modules and should restore any pre-existing module objects after completion.

suggestions.title: Prefer stable test import setup over runtime sys.path mutation
suggestions.summary: Runtime sys.path mutation should be replaced with project-level pytest import path configuration.

suggestions.title: Ensure import-contract tests force fresh imports to avoid module cache false positives
suggestions.summary: Import-contract tests should pop cached modules before import and restore previous module objects in finally blocks.

suggestions.title: Avoid top-level trapi_client import in tests to prevent import-time side effects
suggestions.summary: Import trapi_client inside a fixture/test to ensure test monkeypatch and environment setup are applied before module import.
